currentStatus.summary: Astronomy Hub is being rebuilt from the ground up as a real astronomy command center.
currentStatus.note: The project is now following the rewritten architecture, object model, UI system, and execution plan.

currentFocus: Building the new 'Above Me' scene system
Establishing canonical object and scene contracts
Replacing the old dashboard-first prototype structure with a scene → object → detail flow

recentProgress.title: Phase 1 validation pass completed
recentProgress.summary: Phase 1 checks were re-run end-to-end (scene, detail, location override, degraded handling, and responsiveness). The branch is now audit-ready before push.

recentProgress.title: Scene objects are now interactive
recentProgress.summary: Objects in the Above Me Scene are now clickable and open canonical detail inline without losing scene context.

recentProgress.title: Scene-first command center shell live
recentProgress.summary: A dominant Above Me Scene panel now renders from canonical backend data, with live briefing context and a new light Sky News panel.

recentProgress.title: Phase 1 object detail coverage completed
recentProgress.summary: Object detail now resolves across satellites, planets, and deep-sky objects with visibility guidance, representative media, and related observing context.

recentProgress.title: Frontend command-center shell available
recentProgress.summary: The app now exposes a command-center shell that renders the Above Me briefing panel, recommended targets, passes, and supporting panels from backend-owned data.

recentProgress.title: Interactive panel details
recentProgress.summary: Panel entries (targets, passes, & alerts) now open canonical object detail views inline without losing scene context.

recentProgress.title: Object detail payloads available
recentProgress.summary: Canonical object detail responses are now available at '/api/object/{id}', including explanatory text and representative images.

recentProgress.title: Above Me scene endpoint available
recentProgress.summary: The canonical backend route '/api/scene/above-me' now returns a contract-valid Phase 1 scene combining normalized targets and visible passes.

recentProgress.title: Project documentation system rebuilt
recentProgress.summary: Core architecture, phases, UI structure, object model, ingestion strategy, and execution controls were rewritten and aligned.

recentProgress.title: Phase 1 restart locked in
recentProgress.summary: The project state and session state were corrected so execution now properly starts from Phase 1 again.

recentProgress.title: Phase 1 contract layer added
recentProgress.summary: Canonical Phase 1 contract models and validation tests were added for scene and object data.

inProgress.title: Phase 1 audit review
inProgress.summary: Implementation is complete and waiting for audit approval before any push.

comingNext.title: Scene endpoint goes live
comingNext.summary: The first contract-valid '/api/scene/above-me' route will provide the new Phase 1 scene payload.

comingNext.title: Object detail route
comingNext.summary: A canonical object detail flow will replace inline expansion patterns from the old prototype.

comingNext.title: Frontend command center realignment
comingNext.summary: The UI will be rebuilt around the new scene-first architecture.

roadmap.title: Command Center
roadmap.summary: Build the Above Me experience with clear scene, object interaction, and detail views.

roadmap.title: Engine Exploration
roadmap.summary: Expand into Earth, Sun, Satellite, Solar System, and Deep Sky exploration.

roadmap.title: Visual System
roadmap.summary: Add immersive spatial exploration with maps, globes, and 3D views.

roadmap.title: Knowledge System
roadmap.summary: Connect objects, research, missions, media, and events into a discovery layer.

roadmap.title: Prediction System
roadmap.summary: Add forecasting, alerts, timelines, and personalized recommendations.
